info.name: Subscription Management API
info.description:
Production-ready multi-currency subscription management API with trial periods, grace periods, and automated lifecycle processing.

**Base URL:** `/api/v1/`
**Auth:** Bearer Token (Sanctum) for protected endpoints

item.name: Authentication

request.description:
Register a new user account and receive an authentication token.

**Password Requirements:**
- Minimum 8 characters
- Must contain letters, mixed case, and numbers

response.name: 201 Registered
422 Validation Error

request.description:
Authenticate with email and password to receive a Bearer token.

**Test Credentials (after seeding):**
- Email: test@example.com
- Password: TestPass123

response.name: 200 Login Success
401 Invalid Credentials

item.description:
User authentication endpoints. No authentication required — these endpoints CREATE tokens.

After login, use the returned token in the Authorization header:
`Authorization: Bearer {token}`

item.name: Plans

request.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all active plans with their pricing configurations. No authentication required.

response.name: 200 Success

request.description: Retrieve a single plan by ID with all its pricing configurations. No authentication required.

response.name: 200 Success
response.body:
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Plan retrieved successfully.",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Starter",
    "description": "Perfect for individuals and small projects.",
    "trial_days": 14,
    "has_trial": true,
    "is_active": true,
    "prices": [
      { "id": 1, "currency": "usd", "billing_cycle": "monthly", "price": "9.99", "formatted_price": "$9.99" },
      { "id": 2, "currency": "usd", "billing_cycle": "yearly", "price": "99.99", "formatted_price": "$99.99" },
      { "id": 3, "currency": "aed", "billing_cycle": "monthly", "price": "36.99", "formatted_price": "د.إ36.99" },
      { "id": 4, "currency": "aed", "billing_cycle": "yearly", "price": "369.99", "formatted_price": "د.إ369.99" },
      { "id": 5, "currency": "egp", "billing_cycle": "monthly", "price": "499.00", "formatted_price": "ج.م499.00" },
      { "id": 6, "currency": "egp", "billing_cycle": "yearly", "price": "4999.00", "formatted_price": "ج.م4999.00" }
    ],
    "created_at": "2026-04-04T00:00:00+00:00",
    "updated_at": "2026-04-04T00:00:00+00:00"
  }
}

response.name: 404 Not Found

request.description: Create a new subscription plan with pricing configurations for multiple currencies and billing cycles. Requires authentication.

response.name: 201 Created
422 Validation Error
401 Unauthenticated

request.description: Update an existing plan's attributes and/or replace all its pricing configurations. Requires authentication. Sending a `prices` array will delete existing prices and create new ones.

response.name: 200 Success
response.body:
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Plan updated successfully.",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Updated Plan Name",
    "description": "Perfect for individuals and small projects.",
    "trial_days": 7,
    "has_trial": true,
    "is_active": true,
    "prices": [...],
    "created_at": "2026-04-04T00:00:00+00:00",
    "updated_at": "2026-04-04T12:00:00+00:00"
  }
}

request.description: Soft-delete a plan. The plan and its prices are soft-deleted and can be restored. Requires authentication.

response.name: 200 Success

item.description: Manage subscription plans. Public endpoints for listing/viewing, authenticated endpoints for CRUD operations.

item.name: Subscriptions

request.description: Retrieve all subscriptions for the authenticated user, ordered by newest first.

response.name: 200 Success
response.body:
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Subscriptions retrieved successfully.",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "user_id": 1,
      "plan": {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Starter",
        "description": "Perfect for individuals and small projects.",
        "trial_days": 14,
        "has_trial": true,
        "is_active": true,
        "prices": [],
        "created_at": "2026-04-04T00:00:00+00:00",
        "updated_at": "2026-04-04T00:00:00+00:00"
      },
      "status": "trialing",
      "currency": "usd",
      "billing_cycle": "monthly",
      "price": "9.99",
      "trial_ends_at": "2026-04-18T00:00:00+00:00",
      "starts_at": "2026-04-04T00:00:00+00:00",
      "ends_at": null,
      "grace_period_ends_at": null,
      "has_access": true,
      "is_in_trial": true,
      "is_in_grace_period": false,
      "created_at": "2026-04-04T00:00:00+00:00",
      "updated_at": "2026-04-04T00:00:00+00:00"
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Subscribe the authenticated user to a plan.

- If the plan has a trial period, the subscription starts as `trialing` with `trial_ends_at` set.
- If the plan has no trial, the subscription starts as `active` immediately.
- **Idempotency:** Duplicate requests are rejected with 409 if the user already has an active subscription.

response.name: 201 Created (with trial)
response.body:
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Subscription created successfully.",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "user_id": 1,
    "plan": { ... },
    "status": "trialing",
    "currency": "usd",
    "billing_cycle": "monthly",
    "price": "9.99",
    "trial_ends_at": "2026-04-18T00:00:00+00:00",
    "starts_at": "2026-04-04T00:00:00+00:00",
    "ends_at": null,
    "grace_period_ends_at": null,
    "has_access": true,
    "is_in_trial": true,
    "is_in_grace_period": false
  }
}

response.name: 409 Already Subscribed
404 Price Not Found

request.description: Immediately cancel the specified subscription. Sets `ends_at` to the current timestamp and transitions status to `canceled`. The user must own the subscription.

response.name: 200 Success
response.body:
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Subscription canceled successfully.",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "user_id": 1,
    "plan": { ... },
    "status": "canceled",
    "currency": "usd",
    "billing_cycle": "monthly",
    "price": "9.99",
    "trial_ends_at": null,
    "starts_at": "2026-04-04T00:00:00+00:00",
    "ends_at": "2026-04-04T12:00:00+00:00",
    "grace_period_ends_at": null,
    "has_access": false,
    "is_in_trial": false,
    "is_in_grace_period": false
  }
}

response.name: 403 Forbidden (Not Owner)
422 Invalid State

request.description: Simulate a successful payment for a subscription in `past_due` state. Transitions the subscription back to `active` and clears the grace period. For development/testing purposes.

response.name: 200 Success
response.body:
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Payment simulated successfully. Subscription reactivated.",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "user_id": 1,
    "plan": { ... },
    "status": "active",
    "currency": "usd",
    "billing_cycle": "monthly",
    "price": "9.99",
    "trial_ends_at": null,
    "starts_at": "2026-04-04T00:00:00+00:00",
    "ends_at": null,
    "grace_period_ends_at": null,
    "has_access": true,
    "is_in_trial": false,
    "is_in_grace_period": false
  }
}

request.description: Simulate a payment failure for an `active` subscription. Transitions the subscription to `past_due` and sets `grace_period_ends_at` to 3 days from now. The user retains access during the grace period. For development/testing purposes.

response.name: 200 Success
response.body:
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Payment failure simulated. Subscription is now past_due.",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "user_id": 1,
    "plan": { ... },
    "status": "past_due",
    "currency": "usd",
    "billing_cycle": "monthly",
    "price": "9.99",
    "trial_ends_at": null,
    "starts_at": "2026-04-04T00:00:00+00:00",
    "ends_at": null,
    "grace_period_ends_at": "2026-04-07T12:00:00+00:00",
    "has_access": true,
    "is_in_trial": false,
    "is_in_grace_period": true
  }
}

item.description: Manage user subscriptions. All endpoints require authentication. Users can only manage their own subscriptions.
